center.name: Caura River (Venezuela)
center.summary: Caura River (Venezuela)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Fiery-capped manakin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Venezuela in the Orinoco Basin on the lower the Caura River and the middle Paragua River in Bolívar; there is also a sight record in northwestern Amazonas.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L
